name: R Seurat marker-summary adapter
description: Aggregate a trusted caller-supplied Seurat expression layer by an explicit metadata group into average expression and percent-detected columns for the marker dot-plot contract.

parameters.name: object
parameters.description: Trusted local caller-supplied Seurat object; it is not modified.

parameters.name: features
parameters.description: Features to summarize in caller-declared order.

parameters.name: layer
parameters.description: Existing expression layer; the adapter never normalizes or recomputes it.

parameters.name: average_transform
parameters.description: Use expm1 for log1p-normalized data or identity for already-linear values.

parameters.name: scale_average
parameters.description: If true, z-scale group averages within each feature and retain the unscaled average in a separate column.

transformations.method: explicit expm1 or identity, with optional declared per-feature z-scaling
fraction of cells with layer value > 0 within displayed group

supports_claims: Produces transparent group-level descriptive summaries for downstream plotting.
does_not_support: Does not establish marker specificity, differential significance, biological replication, batch robustness, or causality.
required_statistics: declare assay, layer, transform, scaling, group and detection denominator

visual_fingerprint.review_note: Non-rendering adapter; visual review applies downstream.

notes: Executed against a real Seurat 5.4.0 PBMC3K object and produced the 27-marker average-expression and percent-detected contract used by marker-dotplot-r-v1.
RDS execution is restricted to trusted local inputs; never deserialize untrusted RDS files.
